blockingIssues.description: The rerun fix resolves the Scheme/Racket/Clojure/Common Lisp extraction blockers, but Nginx detection is still incomplete because only the literal filename `nginx.conf` is special-cased while other real `*.conf` Nginx files still fall back to `Ini`.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to document the repo-specific `collect_symbols()` special-case pattern used for flat S-expression grammars such as Scheme, Racket, Clojure Orchard, and Common Lisp.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten the implementation-worker procedure for language additions and follow-up language fixes so workers must either provide explicit `cargo build --release`, `vera index`, `vera stats`, and `vera search --lang` evidence or mark `followedProcedure` false when that manual verification is skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun fix review for `lang-symbol-extraction-fixes` repeated the same gap seen in round 1: the transcript/handoff contained only Cargo validators and targeted tests, but the feature still marked `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` despite `.factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md` requiring manual CLI verification for language work.
